note: 61-year-old male with type 2 diabetes complicated by prior right below-knee amputation in 2019 secondary to diabetic foot ulcer and gangrene. Currently uses a prosthesis, ambulates independently. Diabetes on insulin glargine + lispro. A1C 7.8.
notes: Status codes (Z89.511 acquired absence of right lower leg below the knee) materially affect HCC capture for amputation status.
